meaning: n.相等,平衡,综合体,因素,方程式,等式,
examples: X and Y in the equation are both unknowns.
This figure is reached by a fiendishly clever equation.
The equation is impossible for any value of n greater than 2.
Moreover, insider trading laws imbalance markets by effectively regulating only one-half of the trading equation.
Some forward-looking cities are leading on solving the energy-nexus equation, some out of necessity.
